title: Introduction to Elliptic Quasi-Modular Forms via Moduli Spaces
abstract: In this paper we present rigorously and as succintly as possible the theory of elliptic quasi-modular forms by means of moduli spaces and the Gauss-Manin connection, and deal with one of the main historical appearances of quasi-modular forms, which was the seminal case of mirror symmetry treated by Dijkgraaf.
